products.name: Geraniol 60
products.description_raw:
GERANIOL 60
99.9+% (sum of isomers) 
Geraniol 60 is an approximately 60:40 Mixture of Geraniol (CAS# 106-24-1) and Nerol (CAS# 106-25-2). Nerol is the (Z)-geometric isomer of Geraniol (see last photo). Stored and packaged under inert gas. 
SIZES: 

  1 LITER in amber glass bottle 
  4 LITERS in amber glass jug 
  5 LITERS in HDPE container 
  20 LITERS in HDPE container(s)

products.name: L-Carvone
products.description_raw:
(L)- CARVONE (99.5%) 
CAS# 6485-40-1
(L)- Carvone = (R)- Carvone, is the major component of Spearmint oil, and is mainly responsible for its characteristic scent. Stored and packaged under inert gas. 
SIZES: 

  473 mL in amber glass bottle 
  1 LITER in amber glass bottle 
  4 LITERS in amber glass jug 
  5 LITERS in HDPE container

products.name: 2-Methyltetrahydrofuran
products.description_raw:
2-METHYLTETRAHYDROFURAN (2-Methyl Tetrahydrofuran)
CAS# 96-47-9
Purity: 99.9+%
Water: 129 ppm
Peroxide Inhibitor: 0.027% BHT
Boiling point: 78-80 oC
Density: 0.86 g/mL
Packaged in a new amber glass bottle. Stored and packed under argon. The "GREEN" Ethereal Solvent- manufactured from a natural, renewable resource. MeTHF has some advantages over THF and diethyl ether. Being less miscible with water than THF, MeTHF does not necessarily require removal prior to a standard workup. MeTHF offers better solubility to most organic substrates than diethyl ether. MeTHF has a higher boiling point which allows for a higher reflux temperature and more cushion against exotherms.

products.description_raw:
Hydroxylamine Sulfate (99+%)

Reagent with many uses including synthesis of nitrile fragrances. Packaged in resealable bag within plastic container.

Thymol (the major component of Thyme oil) is a natural pesticide and disinfectant. Packaged in a resealable plastic bag within an HDPE container.

This has a cinnamon odor similar to Cinnamaldehyde, but is more stable toward oxidation (longer shelf life). Always stored and packaged under inert gas.

products.name: Orbit Deer & Rabbit Repellent
products.description_raw:
ORBIT CORNMINT DEER & RABBIT REPELLENT CONCENTRATE
16% Cornmint oil (Mentha arvensis)
Original inventor and formulator of this Cornmint Oil ("Wild Mint") based product for use in deterring plant-consuming animals from eating your vegetables and flowers.
All ingredients are natural (plant-derived) and safe on plants including flowering plants and vegetables. This stable concentrate does not contain rotten eggs or garlic so there is no stink, and it is formulated to resist wash off by rain.

  1 Gallon Concentrate makes 16 Gallons RTU
  1 Quart Concentrate makes 4 Gallons RTU

products.name: Dimethyl Carbonate
products.description_raw:
Dimethyl Carbonate (99+%)
CAS# 616-38-6 
In addition to being a green (environmentally friendly) solvent and cleaning agent, DMC has numerous applications in organic synthesis including carbonate/carbamate synthesis and N- and O- methylation. Stored and packaged under inert gas in HDPE bottles.
